name: Tutoring Flow User Simulation
description: Dynamic multi-turn tutoring session — Socratic method, follow-ups, examples, and note-saving

conversation_scenario.starting_prompt: I'd like a tutoring session on neural networks from my Deep Learning document
conversation_scenario.conversation_plan: Engage with the tutor's Socratic questions by giving partial or incomplete answers to test the tutoring methodology. Ask for a concrete example when the tutor introduces a new concept. After 3-4 exchanges, ask the tutor to check your understanding of backpropagation. Finally, ask to save learning notes summarizing the key insights from the session.

conversation_scenario.starting_prompt: Start a beginner-level tutoring session on sorting algorithms from my Data Structures textbook
conversation_scenario.conversation_plan: Pretend to be a beginner who is confused about basic concepts. Ask clarifying questions when the tutor explains something. Request simpler examples. After the tutor explains the concept, ask for a comprehension check to verify your understanding. Save a learning note at the end summarizing what you learned.
